overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through a vast desert landscape at sunset. The character traverses open sand dunes, passes through a temporary tent shelter, and continues along a rocky desert trail with scattered acacia trees and shrubs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert dunes with distant rocky plateaus

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across sand dunes toward a distant tent structure visible on the horizon

entered.detail: rolling sand dunes stretching to the horizon with warm golden lighting
large rocky cliff formations bordering the desert landscape
bright sun low on the horizon casting long shadows and warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vast open desert at golden hour, with rolling sand dunes extending toward distant rocky plateaus. The sun sits low on the horizon, bathing the scene in warm orange light as the character approaches a small tent structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert tent shelter with red fabric walls

events.description: character enters the tent structure from the bright desert exterior
character exits the tent back into the open desert

agents.ego_description: passing through the temporary tent shelter, moving from shadow back into sunlight

entered.detail: red and orange patterned fabric walls of the temporary desert shelter
wooden poles supporting the fabric canopy of the tent
closed wooden storage chest with metal bindings sitting against the tent wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small tent shelter with fabric walls and wooden supports, briefly moving through the shaded interior past a wooden chest, then exits back into the bright desert sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert trail with scattered acacia trees and shrubs

events.description: character stops walking forward and turns to the right to survey the surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking along the desert path through vegetation, then turning to observe the landscape

entered.detail: scattered acacia trees with flat tops providing sparse shade along the trail
low-lying desert bushes and scrub vegetation dotting the sandy ground
rocky desert cliffs and stone formations rising from the sand
fallen dry branches and deadwood scattered on the sand dunes

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along a rocky desert trail lined with scattered acacia trees and desert shrubs. The terrain features rocky outcrops on the left and rolling sand dunes ahead. Near the end of the clip, the character turns to survey the vast desert landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast desert landscape that transitions from open sand dunes through a temporary shelter and onto a rocky trail. It begins with the character traversing rolling dunes bathed in the warm orange light of a low sun, moving steadily toward a distant tent structure. As the character enters the shelter, the scene shifts briefly into a shaded interior with fabric walls and a wooden chest before emerging back into the bright sunlight. The camera then follows the character along a rocky desert trail lined with scattered acacia trees and shrubs, passing rocky outcrops on the left. Finally, the movement slows as the character turns to survey the expansive desert horizon.
